name: interface-contract-check
description: Verify interface contracts before implementation. Ensures both sides of an API boundary agree.
steps: List all interfaces/types this change touches
For each interface, find all implementations and callers
Check that the proposed change is backward compatible (or document breaking changes)
Verify input validation — what happens with edge-case inputs
Verify output format — does it match what consumers expect
Add or update type tests if the language supports them
